x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Published VA topics define the conversational use cases Now Assist can assist with. More topics means broader AI self-service coverage.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Publish VA topics for top self-service categories. Target: 50+ published topics before Now Assist VA enablement. Focus on high-volume request types first.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Published VA topics define the conversational use cases Now Assist can assist with. More topics means broader AI self-service coverage.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Published VA Topic Count</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addQuery('published', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' published active VA topics';

    if (count >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' published VA topics. Now Assist VA has broad topic coverage for meaningful AI-assisted self-service.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published VA topics (target: 50+). Now Assist VA self-service coverage will be limited — publish additional topics for key use cases.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published VA topics. Insufficient topic coverage for meaningful Now Assist VA self-service — a minimum foundation of topics is required before AI enhancement adds value.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module>
<number>CHK0006128</number>
<order>30</order>
<remediation_guidance>Publish VA topics for top self-service categories. Target: 50+ published topics before Now Assist VA enablement. Focus on high-volume request types first.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1b</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
